title: IT Help Desk Hours
content: The IT help desk is available Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

title: VPN Access Request
content: Employees can request VPN access through the IT service portal. Manager approval and completion of multi-factor authentication enrollment are required.

title: Password Reset
content: To reset your password, use the self-service password portal. If your account is locked or you cannot complete verification, contact the IT help desk.

title: Software Installation Request
content: Submit software installation requests through the IT service portal. Include the software name, business justification, device name, and manager approval when required.

title: Create a ServiceNow Ticket
content: To create a ServiceNow ticket, open the IT service portal, select the appropriate incident or request category, provide a clear description, add any relevant screenshots, and submit the form.

title: New Employee Access
content: New employee access requests should be submitted by the hiring manager before the employee's start date. The request should include required applications, shared drives, distribution lists, and any privileged access.
